title: Infected Blood Compensation Scheme Technical Expert Group (2025)
body: "The Minister for the Cabinet Office has established an Infected Blood Compensation Scheme Technical Expert Group to provide advice to support the Government’s response to the Inquiry’s Additional Report recommendations. This page contains:    Open letter from the Minister for the Cabinet Office to the Chair of the Technical Expert Group (PDF) Open letter from the Minister for the Cabinet Office to the Chair of the Technical Expert Group (HTML) An open letter from the Chair of the Technical Expert Group (December 2025) (PDF) An open letter from the Chair of the Technical Expert Group (December 2025) (HTML) Roundtable background paper - Special Category Mechanism (December 2025) (HTML) An open letter from the Chair of the Technical Expert Group (October 2025) (PDF) An open letter from the Chair of the Technical Expert Group (October 2025) (HTML) Minutes of the meetings of the Technical Expert Group (September-October 2025) (HTML) Terms of Reference for the Infected Blood Compensation Scheme Technical Expert Group (2025) The Infected Blood Compensation Scheme Technical Expert Group (2025) work programme Open letters exchanged between the Minister for the Cabinet Office and the Chair of the Technical Expert Group  "
